title: Sweet Syrian Crumble
description: A delicious dessert featuring a sweet and crunchy topping over a rich Syrian-inspired filling.
instructions: Thaw the phyllo dough according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, mix together the almond flour, granulated sugar, and ground cinnamon.
Add the crumbly phyllo dough to the bowl and mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, mix together the sweet syrian cheese, ground allspice, and salt.
Add the beaten egg to the cheese mixture and mix until well combined.
Pour the cheese mixture into a 9x9 inch baking dish.
Top the cheese mixture with the phyllo dough mixture.
Dot the top of the phyllo dough with the unsalted butter.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the filling is heated through.
